concerns.analysis:
The source PDF contains an agency seal/logo on the first page ('North Carolina Marine Fisheries'). In the HTML output, there is no corresponding `` element for this meaningful image; it is instead rendered as a text placeholder `

[Image: ...]

`. Because this is an agency seal on the first page and no instance of it appears as an actual image in the HTML, this is a failure.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Seal/logo at the top left of page 1.
concerns.output_quote: [Image: Seal of the North Carolina Marine Fisheries celebrating 200 years of management and conservation (1822-2022)]

concerns.description: Full-page image alongside extracted text (1 page(s))
concerns.analysis: suspect_pages=1. A scanned/screenshot page image duplicates content already present as text elements.

concerns.description: Displaced hyperlinks: 3 link(s) extracted as standalone elements instead of inline text
concerns.analysis: standalone_links=3, examples=['https://www.ecfr.gov/current/title-50/part-648/subpart-i', 'https://www.ecfr.gov/current/title-50/part-648/subpart-i', 'http://www.ncmarinefisheries.net/']. Links should be inline within paragraphs, not separate blocks.

concerns.description: List broken by page break (1 instance(s)): p2→p3: ordered list J→K continues
concerns.analysis: split_list_count=1. Lists that span page breaks should be extracted as a single continuous structure. Split lists affect reading order and navigability for assistive technology.

concerns.description: Lists converted incorrectly: 2 ordered list(s) have alphabetical markers (A, B, C) rendered as numeric — e.g. "A. It is unlawful for persons participating in a commercial"; "A. FISH TRAPS/POTS: It is unlawful to use black sea bass tra"
concerns.analysis: alpha_numeric_confusion=2. Ordered list items start with sequential letter prefixes (A., B., C.) but are rendered as numeric lists, losing the alphabetical semantics.

concerns.description: Incomplete image alt text: 1 image(s) with inadequate descriptions (1 truncated mid-sentence) — e.g. p3: "...ision of Marine Fisheries, including an address in"
concerns.analysis: incomplete_alt_text=1 (truncated=1, placeholder=0, empty=0). Per WCAG 2.1 AA, meaningful images must have descriptive alternative text for screen-reader accessibility.
The source PDF heavily uses underline for emphasis in list items (e.g., inside Section II). The output completely loses this underline formatting, rendering it as plain text without any markup.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: A. It is unlawful for persons participating in a commercial fishing operation employing fish pots, traps, and/or hook and line gear, regardless of the number of people involved, to possess or land more than 2,000 pounds of black sea bass per trip.
concerns.output_quote: A. It is unlawful for persons participating in a commercial fishing operation employing fish pots, traps, and/or hook and line gear, regardless of the number of people involved, to possess or land more than 2,000 pounds of black sea bass per trip.

concerns.description: Degraded image quality: 1 image(s) used fallback rendering instead of direct extraction
concerns.analysis: fallback_rendered_images=1. Examples: p3: "Footer text containing contact information for the". These images were not directly extracted from the PDF — instead, an approximate page region was rendered as a PNG. Fallback images may be cropped incorrectly, show the wrong content, or miss meaningful visual elements.

concerns.description:
Header/footer elements retained in output (1): State of North Carolina | Division of Marine Fisheries
3441
concerns.analysis: header_footer_count=1. Header/footer text from extraction JSON is present in the rendered HTML — the renderer failed to strip it. This is a structural accessibility issue.
